retrieved_result: WITHIN GRADE INCREASE (WG) "Within-grade increases (WGIs), or step increases, are periodic increases in a General Schedule (GS) or Wage Grade (WG) employee’s rate of basic pay from one step of the grade of his or her position to the next higher step of that grade.
